---
title: "Day 1: Welcome to the Future Intelligence Lab!"
author: "Simon Guest"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
    incremental: true
    center-title-slide: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: [default, ../../theme/dark.scss]
    logo: ../../theme/codercub.png
    highlight-style: dracula
    title-slide-attributes:
      data-background-gradient: "linear-gradient(135deg, #0a0e1a 0%, #0d2137 60%, #1a1f35 100%)"

---

# About Me

- TBD

# What is Artificial Intelligence (AI)?

## What is Artificial Intelligence (AI)?

- TBD

# AI All Around You

What are the different types of AI that you have experienced?

[Join Board](https://miro.com/app/board/uXjVHQ3gK7A=/?share_link_id=187298904915){.external target="miro"}

# Types of AI

## Types of AI

- TBD
- Regression
- Classification
- Neural Network
- LLM (Large Language Model)
- CV (Computer Vision)

## Types of AI

- TBD: Single slide for each type


## TBD

```python
print("Hello world")
```

## NN Demo

## Will I Do Well on My Test?

```{=html}
<iframe src="../components/nn.html" allowtransparency="true" width="100%" height="600px" style="border:none; background:transparent;"></iframe>
```
